title: el10 : sigstore verification fail on images missing `sigstore` annotations
body:
On RHEL10 / c10s which are running the `v5.6-rhel` branch of this repo IIUC, we can't run redhat ubi containers : 

Minimal reproducer
```
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ rpm -qa containers-common podman skopeo 
containers-common-0.64.0-4.el10.noarch
skopeo-1.20.0-1.el10.x86_64
podman-5.6.0-2.el10.x86_64
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ podman run --rm -it registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest bash
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest...
Error: unable to copy from source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest: copying system image from manifest list: Source image rejected: None of the signatures were accepted, reasons: missing dev.sigstore.cosign/bundle annotation; missing dev.sigstore.cosign/bundle annotation; Signature for identity "registry.redhat.io/ubi8/ubi:latest" is not accepted; Signature for identity "registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:8.10" is not accepted
```


xref https://github.com/coreos/rhel-coreos-config/issues/85

comments.body:
I guess i could rather raise this issue against UBI ? But the annotation were not present in older images and podman had no issues until now. 
The `policy.json` didn't change for a few months either, the new change was the podman 5.6.0-2 , so that's why I opened the issue here.
@mtrmac This smells like an issue with the images, no?

~Same bug https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CLOUDDST-29544~ Sorry, get confirmation from https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CLOUDDST-29221, it is because of signing outage, not related to podman. Maybe can close this issue.

Thank you for pointing me to the right place @mtrmac and @HuijingHei
The ubi8 image is now properly signed
